summary: Completed comprehensive testing of redesigned login page with all 4 login flows. Backend API tests: 15/15 passed. Frontend UI and integration tests: All flows working correctly after fixing useRestaurantId hook usage and AuthContext integration.

issues: Restaurant name shows '18march' (hardcoded default) when no restaurantId in URL - expected behavior for /login route

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin password (email=owner@youngmonk.com, password=admin123) returns success=true, user_type=restaurant
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with customer phone+otp returns success with has_password field
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with customer phone only (no password/otp) returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with customer phone and wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with customer phone and no password set returns 'No password set' error
Backend: POST /api/auth/send-otp sends OTP successfully
Backend: POST /api/auth/send-otp to unregistered phone returns 404
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with mismatched passwords returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid OTP returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/set-password with mismatched passwords returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/set-password with short password returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/check-customer returns exists status and has_password field
Backend: Login with non-existent user returns 404
Frontend: Login page shows phone input at data-testid='login-phone-input'
Frontend: Login page shows password input at data-testid='login-password-input'
Frontend: Login button at data-testid='login-submit-btn'
Frontend: 'Use OTP instead' link at data-testid='login-use-otp-btn'
Frontend: 'Forgot Password?' link at data-testid='login-forgot-password-btn'
Frontend: Restaurant logo displayed on login page
Frontend: Admin login flow works (enter email + password → login → redirected to /admin/settings)
Frontend: OTP flow works (send OTP → OTP input appears with data-testid='login-otp-input')
Frontend: Complete OTP login flow works (send OTP → verify → login → set-password prompt if has_password=false)
Frontend: Forgot Password flow works (send OTP → verify → reset password form appears)
Frontend: Set Password form has Skip button at data-testid='set-password-skip-btn'
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: useRestaurantId() returns object {restaurantId, isSubdomainMode, subdomain} but Login.jsx was assigning it directly instead of destructuring - fixed to const { restaurantId } = useRestaurantId()

Fixed bug: Login.jsx was calling AuthContext's login() function with (token, user, user_type) but login() expects (phoneOrEmail, otpOrPassword, isOTP, restaurantContext) - added setAuth() helper to AuthContext for direct state setting
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test customer 7505242126
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page redesign is complete and tested. All 4 flows working: Flow A (password login for admin/customer), Flow B (OTP login for customer), Flow C (Forgot password with OTP verification), Flow D (Set password prompt after OTP login if has_password=false). Key fixes made: 1) useRestaurantId() destructuring, 2) AuthContext setAuth() helper for external login handling. OTP is logged server-side (check backend.err.log) and returned in API response as otp_for_testing for testing purposes.

bugs_fixed.issue: useRestaurantId hook returns object but was assigned directly to variable
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'const restaurantId = useRestaurantId()' to 'const { restaurantId } = useRestaurantId()'

bugs_fixed.issue: Calling login() from AuthContext with wrong parameters caused [object Object] error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed login(data.token, data.user, data.user_type) to setAuth(data.token, data.user, data.user_type)

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing direct auth state setter for external login handling
bugs_fixed.fix: Added setAuth(newToken, newUser, newUserType) function to allow Login.jsx to set auth state directly
